manifest.name: Johnny.Decimal Manager

name: Johnny.Decimal Manager

releases.author: rzrabbi
releases.description:
## Overview

Johnny.Decimal Manager 1.0.1 is a maintenance release for the initial public release. It keeps the same user-facing features as 1.0.0 while addressing Community Portal review findings and improving release provenance.

## Highlights

- Create Johnny.Decimal areas, categories, and items directly from Obsidian.
- Automatically detect and create missing parent folders when needed.
- Suggest the next available Johnny.Decimal number based on the current folder structure.
- Prevent duplicate item creation through safer lookup and validation logic.
- Support a cleaner file explorer view by visually hiding Johnny.Decimal prefixes without renaming files on disk.
- Support dynamic area formatting while preserving the standard folder structure underneath.

## Improvements in This Release

- Improved overall stability and compatibility based on automated review feedback.
- Refined a few interface labels and behaviors for a more consistent Obsidian experience.
- Added better release tooling so future updates are easier to verify and publish.

## Installation

### BRAT

1. Install the [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) plugin.
2. Open BRAT settings and click **Add Beta plugin**.
3. Enter the repository URL: `rzrabbi/obsidian-johnny-decimal-manager`.

### Manual

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the release assets attached below.
2. Place them inside your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/johnny-decimal-manager/` directory.
3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.

releases.author: rzrabbi
releases.description:
## Overview

Johnny.Decimal Manager 1.0.0 is the first public release of the plugin for Obsidian. It is designed to help users create and manage Johnny.Decimal structures directly inside their vault while keeping the experience simple, safe, and non-destructive.

## Highlights

- Create Johnny.Decimal areas, categories, and items directly from Obsidian.
- Automatically detect and create missing parent folders when needed.
- Suggest the next available Johnny.Decimal number based on the current folder structure.
- Prevent duplicate item creation through safer lookup and validation logic.
- Support a cleaner file explorer view by visually hiding Johnny.Decimal prefixes without renaming files on disk.
- Support dynamic area formatting while preserving the standard folder structure underneath.

## Improvements in This Release

- Hardened Johnny.Decimal parsing and duplicate detection.
- Added safer vault filename validation before file and folder creation.
- Improved async creation flow to reduce accidental duplicate actions.
- Added interactive help actions in the creation modal for JD number formats and naming guidance.
- Added a Johnny.Decimal reference section in plugin settings to improve onboarding.
- Improved modal readability and general UI consistency.
- Removed default hotkeys to better align with Obsidian plugin publishing expectations.
- Moved inline UI styling into CSS for cleaner packaging and maintainability.
- Enabled production-ready minified builds.
- Updated plugin metadata and documentation for the public release.

## Installation

### BRAT

1. Install the [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) plugin.
2. Open BRAT settings and click **Add Beta plugin**.
3. Enter the repository URL: `rzrabbi/obsidian-johnny-decimal-manager`.

### Manual

1. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` from the release assets attached below.
2. Place them inside your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/johnny-decimal-manager/` directory.
3. Reload Obsidian and enable the plugin.

## Notes

This release is intended to be the stable starting point for public use and future iteration. Manual installation files for this version are provided through the release assets.

releases.author: rzrabbi
releases.description:
Johnny.Decimal Manager is an Obsidian plugin designed to reduce the friction of maintaining a Johnny.Decimal structure inside a vault. This first public beta introduces the core creation workflow, non-destructive visual formatting, and basic conflict prevention.

## Features

- Smart cascading creation for Area, Category, and Item structures in a single workflow.
- Intelligent ID suggestions based on the next available Johnny.Decimal number in the current folder context.
- Clean View, which visually hides Johnny.Decimal prefixes in the file explorer without renaming files on disk.
- Dynamic area formatting with support for either range display (`10-19`) or single-number display (`10`).
- Conflict prevention to reduce duplicate Johnny.Decimal numbers and preserve structural consistency.

## Installation

### BRAT

Add `rzrabbi/obsidian-johnny-decimal-manager` to BRAT.

### Manual

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, then place them in:

```text
.obsidian/plugins/johnny-decimal-manager/
```

## Feedback

This is an early beta release. Bug reports and feature requests are welcome through the project issue tracker.
releases.name: 1.0.0-beta.1: The First Public Beta
